'''nolabaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:yellable|yellable]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-l-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yellable|yellable]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| nolabaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:nolabithi|nolabithi]] || [[word:nolabiji|nolabiji]] || [[word:nolabishi|nolabishi]] || [[word:nolabiki|nolabiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:nolabuthuthu|nolabuthuthu]] || [[word:nolabujuju|nolabujuju]] || [[word:nolabushushu|nolabushushu]] || [[word:nolabukuku|nolabukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:nolabuthu|nolabuthu]] || [[word:nolabuju|nolabuju]] || [[word:nolabushu|nolabushu]] || [[word:nolabuku|nolabuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:nolabufthuf|nolabufthuf]] || [[word:nolabufjuf|nolabufjuf]] || [[word:nolabufshuf|nolabufshuf]] || [[word:nolabufkuf|nolabufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:nolabethe|nolabethe]] || [[word:nolabeje|nolabeje]] || [[word:nolabeshe|nolabeshe]] || [[word:nolabeke|nolabeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:nolabothotho|nolabothotho]] || [[word:nolabojojo|nolabojojo]] || [[word:nolaboshosho|nolaboshosho]] || [[word:nolabokoko|nolabokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:nolabotho|nolabotho]] || [[word:nolabojo|nolabojo]] || [[word:nolabosho|nolabosho]] || [[word:nolaboko|nolaboko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:nolabofthof|nolabofthof]] || [[word:nolabofjof|nolabofjof]] || [[word:nolabofshof|nolabofshof]] || [[word:nolabofkof|nolabofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:nolabĂŻfthĂŻf|nolabĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:nolabĂŻfjĂŻf|nolabĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:nolabĂŻfshĂŻf|nolabĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:nolabĂŻfkĂŻf|nolabĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:nolabĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|nolabĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:nolabĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|nolabĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:nolabĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|nolabĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:nolabĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|nolabĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:nolabĂŻfthĂŻf|nolabĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:nolabĂŻfjĂŻf|nolabĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:nolabĂŻfshĂŻf|nolabĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:nolabĂŻfkĂŻf|nolabĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:nolabĂŻfthĂŻf|nolabĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:nolabĂŻfjĂŻf|nolabĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:nolabĂŻfshĂŻf|nolabĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:nolabĂŻfkĂŻf|nolabĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:nolabĂŠthĂŠ|nolabĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:nolabĂŠjĂŠ|nolabĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:nolabĂŠshĂŠ|nolabĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:nolabĂŠkĂŠ|nolabĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:nolabathatha|nolabathatha]] || [[word:nolabajaja|nolabajaja]] || [[word:nolabashasha|nolabashasha]] || [[word:nolabakaka|nolabakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:nolabatha|nolabatha]] || [[word:nolabaja|nolabaja]] || [[word:nolabasha|nolabasha]] || [[word:nolabaka|nolabaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:nolabafthaf|nolabafthaf]] || [[word:nolabafjaf|nolabafjaf]] || [[word:nolabafshaf|nolabafshaf]] || [[word:nolabafkaf|nolabafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:nolabasha|nolabasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:nolabshĂ«sha|nolabshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:nolabrosha|nolabrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:nolabmusha|nolabmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:nolabyasha|nolabyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonolabnkshĂ«sha|gonolabnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonolabnkrosha|gonolabnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonolabnkmusha|gonolabnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gonolabnkyasha|gonolabnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:nolalabasha|nolalabasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:nolalabshĂ«sha|nolalabshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:nolalabrosha|nolalabrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:nolalabmusha|nolalabmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:nolalabyasha|nolalabyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonolalabnkshĂ«sha|gonolalabnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonolalabnkrosha|gonolalabnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonolalabnkmusha|gonolalabnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gonolalabnkyasha|gonolalabnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:nelĂŠbasha|nelĂŠbasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:nelĂŠbshĂ«sha|nelĂŠbshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:nelĂŠbrosha|nelĂŠbrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:nelĂŠbmusha|nelĂŠbmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:nelĂŠbyasha|nelĂŠbyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonelĂŠbnkshĂ«sha|gonelĂŠbnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonelĂŠbnkrosha|gonelĂŠbnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonelĂŠbnkmusha|gonelĂŠbnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gonelĂŠbnkyasha|gonelĂŠbnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:nolfabasha|nolfabasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:nolfabshĂ«sha|nolfabshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:nolfabrosha|nolfabrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:nolfabmusha|nolfabmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:nolfabyasha|nolfabyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonolfabnkshĂ«sha|gonolfabnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonolfabnkrosha|gonolfabnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonolfabnkmusha|gonolfabnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gonolfabnkyasha|gonolfabnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a6f1c69}}
